entries.command: pat -s J0437-4715.std -A FDM -f 'tempo2 IPTA' <ar> > .tim ; tempo2 -nobs 50000 -output general2 -f J0437-4715.par .tim -s '{sat} {pre} {err}' -nofit → matplotlib
paz -r -e paz raw_added.ar && psrplot -g 1200x800 -p freq -j D raw_added.paz -D landing/rfi-after.png/png
psradd -o raw_added.ar archives/J0437-4715_raw/*.ar && psrplot -g 1200x800 -p freq -j D raw_added.ar -D landing/rfi-before.png/png

pam -FT -e FT raw_added.paz; psrplot -g 1200x800 -p stokes raw_added.paz.FT -D pipelines/paz+pamFT+stokes/scrunched.png/png
paz -r -e paz raw_added.ar; psrplot -g 1200x800 -p freq raw_added.paz -D pipelines/paz+pamFT+stokes/zapped.png/png
pam -T -e Tscr added.ar; psrplot -g 1200x800 -p time -j F added.Tscr -D pipelines/psradd+pamT+psrplot/added-tscr__step3.png/png
psradd -o added.ar ep1.ar ep2.ar; psrplot -g 1200x800 -p time -j F added.ar -D pipelines/psradd+pamT+psrplot/added__step2.png/png
psradd -o ep1.ar <first 16 raw subints>; psrplot -g 1200x800 -p time -j F ep1.ar -D pipelines/psradd+pamT+psrplot/ep1__step1.png/png
psradd -o ep2.ar <remaining raw subints>; psrplot -g 1200x800 -p time -j F ep2.ar -D pipelines/psradd+pamT+psrplot/ep2__step1b.png/png
pat -s template.std -A FDM <ar> > toas.tim; tempo2 -nobs 50000 -nofit -output general2 -f .par toas.tim → matplotlib
